title: RESOURCES REFERRAL - 211info
text: ESCUDO LATINO RESOURCES REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects community members to resources in the area and to bilingual and bicultural staff at other agencies and organizations. 530 C Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on serving the Hispanic/Latin community Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 321-8034 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 321-8034 Mariela German [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: In downtown Springfield on C Street between 5th street and 6th Street. Services: Language Interpretation * Hispanic/Latino Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
